baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare it against a no-skill baseline or previous-version snapshot using the same prompt and inputs.

evals.prompt: Bump this project to v1.2.3 and prepare release notes.
evals.expected_output: A repo-specific version bump and changelog update with extracted release notes and matching validation gates.
assertions: Detects the version source before editing.
Keeps Keep a Changelog and SemVer conventions intact.
Includes only functional changelog entries and omits chores, docs-only updates, validation runs, and empty category headings.
Uses release helper scripts with explicit flags when applicable.
Validates version, tag, and changelog consistency.
